title: Part-Load Performance Curves
full_text:
8.4.3.8 Part-Load Performance Curves
Part-Load Performance Curves
1) Part-load performance curves for the proposed building's systems shall be
consistent with the equipment detailed in the building specifications.
2) Where part-load performance curves referred to in Sentence (1) are not
available, the performance curves provided in Subsection 8.4.5. shall be used.

sentences.text: Part-load performance curves for the proposed building's systems shall be consistent with the equipment detailed in the building specifications.
Where part-load performance curves referred to in Sentence (1) are not available, the performance curves provided in Subsection 8.4.5. shall be used.
